game_start.title: Welcome to Universe Market Builder
game_start.intro: In the vast expanse of space, opportunity awaits those bold enough to seize it.
game_start.backstory: You are a merchant captain, inheriting a modest trading corporation and a small ship.
game_start.goal: Your goal: build an empire across the stars through trade, exploration, and strategic expansion.
game_start.closing: The universe is yours to explore. Chart your own course to success.

tutorial.title: Getting Started
tutorial.navigation: Use the Navigation buttons to jump between connected systems.
tutorial.docking: Dock at stations or land on planets to access local markets.
tutorial.energy: Monitor your ship's energy - each jump consumes fuel.
tutorial.corporation: Build your corporation's value by acquiring assets and trading goods.

ui.help_prompt: Type a command and press Enter to interact with the game.

jump_planner.sequence_complete: Jump sequence complete. Arrived at destination: System {destinationId}

settings.not_implemented: Game Settings feature is not yet implemented.
